title: Request Rate by Service and Endpoint
description: HTTP request throughput across CRM and Drone Shop grouped by route and status code. Identifies hotspots, traffic patterns, and potential DDoS indicators.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and message = 'Request completed' | stats count as Requests, avg('http.response_time_ms') as AvgLatency by 'service.name', 'http.url.path', 'http.status_code' | sort -Requests
